rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE D.F. & A.J. RAVETTI FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Compel Trustee To Provide An Accounting; Determine Validity Of Trust Provision;Etc/
rulings.Rulings: Continued to November 18, 2014. No dismissal filed as of this date, Motion for Summary Adjudication still on calendar. No Motion for Leave to file Amended Petition filed as of this date. All documents related to a hearing must be filed at least 3 court days prior to the hearing in order to allow the Court time to consider all pleadings and determine the appropriate course of action. File stamped courtesy copies must be delivered in person to the court (no fax or email).
